features.name: XOR binary operator applied to assignment pattern expression
features.description: Code should include a binary XOR operator (^) applied to an assignment pattern expression as one of its operands
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] b, c;
initial b = c ^ '{b};

features.name: assignment pattern with replicated value in expression context
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern expression using replication syntax that appears in a binary operation context
